div.style: color: rgb(241, 245, 249) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
bucket: rate 500/s · burst 1000 · emergency force-consumes & bypasses shedder
shed probability = max( loop-lag, active-calls, queue-depth, routing-API p95 )

div.style: color: rgb(241, 245, 249) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(241, 245, 249) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(241, 245, 249) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(241, 245, 249) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
activates when recv-queue > 70% of 100 · byte-scans for INVITE + emergency marker
new non-emergency INVITE under pressure → template 503 (no parse, no fiber)
everything else (in-dialog, ACK, BYE, responses, emergency) passes
